title: Week of April 6, 2026
summary: This week focused on improving OpsPal's stability and reliability behind the scenes. The platform now automatically cleans up old files and resolves configuration issues that could slow down your workflows. Most importantly, OpsPal now prevents common Salesforce errors when working with Dynamic Forms and Record Types, making your data operations more reliable.

entries.headline: OpsPal automatically cleans up old files during updates
details: Removes outdated cache files older than 7 days
Cleans up abandoned session files older than 5 minutes
Warns you if memory usage files become too large

entries.headline: Better handling of Salesforce Dynamic Forms and Record Types
details: Prevents errors when adding fields to pages with Dynamic Forms enabled
Automatically assigns new Record Types to System Administrator profiles
Improves workflow routing to reduce session interruptions

entries.headline: OpsPal automatically fixes missing dependencies at startup
details: Detects and installs missing components in the background
Shows clear error messages when installation fails
Provides manual fix commands when automatic repair isn't possible
